header_title.description: Erinnya ly’ekikozesebwa eryawereddwa mu mutwe. Ekikozesebwa eky’okufuna ebirungo eby’enjawulo okuva mu bikoni by’ensi yonna.

header_subtitle.text: Laba ebirungo okuva mu bifo by’ensi yonna
header_subtitle.description: Ekitundu eky’obulungi ekyawereddwa wansi w’erinnya ly’ekikozesebwa mu mutwe.

home_page_hero_title.description: Ekifaananyi ekikulu ku lupapula lw’ewaka mu kitundu eky’ekibuga.

home_page_hero_subtitle.text: Laba ebirungo eby’obulamu eby’amaanyi okuva mu bikoni by’ensi yonna
home_page_hero_subtitle.description: Ekitundu eky’obulungi ekyawereddwa wansi w’ekifaananyi ekikulu ku lupapula lw’ewaka.

home_page_featured_title.description: Ekifaananyi ekyawereddwa waggulu ku kaadi y’ebirungo.

recipe_card_cooking_time.description: Ekitundu eky’omutindo gw’okukola ku kaadi y’ebirungo. {minutes} ky’akolebwa n’ennamba y’ebiddaakiika.

recipe_card_difficulty.description: Ekitundu ekyawereddwa nga kibanza ku mutindo gw’obuzibu ku kaadi y’ebirungo.

recipe_card_easy.description: Ekitundu eky’omutindo gw’obuzibu ekyegatta ku kirungo ekirina obusanyizo.

recipe_card_medium.description: Ekitundu eky’omutindo gw’obuzibu ekyegatta ku kirungo ekirina obuzibu obutono.

recipe_card_hard.description: Ekitundu eky’omutindo gw’obuzibu ekyegatta ku kirungo ekirina obuzibu obunene.

recipe_card_ramen_description.text: Amayinja ag’amazzi ag’amaanyi agava mu mbuto za nyama y’embuzi n’ennyama eza chashu ezisanyizo, eggi ery’amaanyi, n’ebikadde eby’obulungi.

recipe_card_margherita_description.text: Pizaa ya Neapolitan ey’obulamu nga erimu tomato za San Marzano, mozzarella empya, ne basil.

recipe_card_tacos_description.text: Tacos za nyama y’embuzi ezisanyizo eziri wamu n’epinepuli, cilantro, n’ensigo ku bibbo bya siminti.

recipe_card_butter_chicken_description.text: Ennyama y’inkoko entuufu mu ssupu ey’obutunda n’amafuta n’ebirungo eby’obuwunga.

recipe_card_pad_thai_description.text: Ebikadde eby’obulungi eby’okukola n’ebitookye, tofu, peanuts, n’amayinja ga tamarind.

recipe_card_crepes_name.description: Erinnya lya Crepes z’Ebifananyi by’Amawanga g’e Bufalansa.

recipe_card_crepes_description.text: Crepes ezisinga obulungi ezibadde n’ekyokulya kya Nutella, bisembe eby’obulamu, n’omuwendo gwa whipped cream.
recipe_card_crepes_description.description: Amagezi ku Crepes z’Ebifananyi by’Amawanga g’e Bufalansa.

locale_switcher_label.description: Ekitundu eky’amaanyi eky’okuddamu ku lulimi mu mutwe.

locale_switcher_en.description: Ekifaananyi ky’olulimi lw’oluzungu mu kulondoola kw’olulimi.

locale_switcher_ja.description: Ekifaananyi ky’olulimi lw’eyapani mu kulondoola kw’olulimi.

locale_switcher_es.description: Ekifaananyi ky’olulimi lw’esipanyolo mu kulondoola kw’olulimi.
